message:
feat(sync): integrate rich output into sync command

- sync --status: Panel with colored state indicators and metadata
- sync --flush-only: Export summary Panel with counts
- sync (import): Import summary Panel with processed counts
- sync --merge: 3-way merge Panel with conflict display

Uses rich_rust Panel/Text components for consistent styling.

Closes beads_rust-2qmp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
